steps.title: Identify the key difference to emphasize
steps.content:
The question asks which choice best “emphasizes a difference” between the two works.

From the notes, the most salient difference is their material composition: Above and Below is aluminum tubing, while Silver Upper White River is recycled silver.

To effectively emphasize this difference, a choice must use explicit contrast language.

steps.title: Find the choice with explicit contrast
steps.content:
B uses “by contrast” to juxtapose the materials—aluminum tubing versus recycled silver.

A simply lists both without contrasting them; D doesn't mention Silver Upper White River; and C focuses on the Vietnam Memorial instead of comparing the two works.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
